title: TradePilot AI Context Summary
description: Represents the compact working memory of one Trade Session, preserving confirmed trade facts, current thesis, active position state, latest analytical conclusions, important historical changes, user-confirmed actions, and unresolved warnings for use in subsequent AI analysis.

currentPositionContext.title: Current Position Context
currentPositionContext.description: Compact canonical position state used by the next analysis.

thesisContext.title: Thesis Context
thesisContext.description: Original and current thesis preserved for longitudinal comparison.

activeLevels.title: Active Levels
activeLevels.description: Latest accepted and proposed price levels relevant to the next analysis.

latestMarketContext.title: Latest Market Context
latestMarketContext.description: Compact latest market snapshot used as a reference for the next update.

latestOrderbookContext.title: Latest Orderbook Context
latestOrderbookContext.description: Latest accepted orderbook conclusion and key levels.

latestChartContext.title: Latest Chart Context
latestChartContext.description: Latest accepted chart interpretation, including whether it came from current or historical chart evidence.

latestAiAssessment.title: Latest AI Assessment
latestAiAssessment.description: Latest accepted AI judgment carried forward to the next analysis.

activeTradingPlan.title: Active Trading Plan
activeTradingPlan.description: Latest accepted practical plan carried forward into the next analysis.

importantHistoryItem.title: Important History Item
importantHistoryItem.description: One material historical fact that should remain available in future AI context.

confirmedActionSummary.title: Confirmed Action Summary
confirmedActionSummary.description: Compact representation of one user-confirmed action that must not be overwritten by AI interpretation.

unresolvedItems.title: Unresolved Items
unresolvedItems.description: Missing data, warnings, pending proposals, and questions that should remain visible to the next analysis.

closingContext.title: Closing Context
closingContext.description: Final session result retained when the Trade Session has been closed.

contextQuality.title: Context Quality
contextQuality.description: Indicates whether the compact memory is sufficiently complete and current for the next AI analysis.

thesis_context.original_thesis: BBRI berpotensi melanjutkan rebound menuju 2.900–2.920 selama buyer menjaga area 2.780 dan support utama 2.700 tidak ditembus.
thesis_context.current_thesis: Thesis rebound masih valid karena harga bertahan di atas support aktif, berada di atas average, dan buyer tetap menjaga area 2.870–2.880.
thesis_context.support_condition: Harga bertahan di atas 2.840 dan bid tidak melemah secara material.
thesis_context.invalidation_condition: Harga menembus 2.840 disertai tekanan seller yang meningkat.
weakening_factors: Buyer belum menunjukkan dominasi sangat kuat.

entry_reference.label: Confirmed entry
entry_reference.summary: Harga entry yang telah dikonfirmasi user.

active_stop_loss.label: Confirmed stop loss
active_stop_loss.summary: Stop loss aktif yang telah dikonfirmasi user.

active_target.label: Confirmed target
active_target.summary: Target aktif yang telah dikonfirmasi user.

invalidation_level.label: Current thesis invalidation
invalidation_level.summary: Level yang membatalkan thesis saat ini.

latest_market_context.summary: Harga berada di bagian atas range harian, di atas average, dan masih menghadapi resistance di area 2.900.

bid_support.label: Bid support
bid_support.summary: Area bid yang perlu bertahan untuk menjaga momentum.

key_observations: Buyer lebih baik dibanding update pagi.
latest_orderbook_context.conclusion: Orderbook masih mendukung hold, tetapi target memerlukan penyerapan offer 2.900.

latest_chart_context.conclusion: Chart masih mendukung thesis rebound, tetapi konteks berasal dari initial analysis.
limitations: Tidak ada chart baru pada update siang.

latest_ai_assessment.summary: Bias masih bullish moderat. Posisi tetap layak dipertahankan dengan resistance 2.900 sebagai hambatan utama.

active_trading_plan.action_rationale: Posisi masih profit dan thesis tetap valid.
active_trading_plan.hold_condition: Pertahankan posisi selama harga bertahan di atas 2.840 dan buyer tidak melemah secara material.
active_trading_plan.reduce_risk_condition: Kurangi risiko jika harga gagal berulang kali di 2.900 dan bid 2.870 mulai menghilang.
active_trading_plan.exit_condition: Tinjau exit jika harga menembus 2.840 dengan tekanan seller yang meningkat.

important_history.summary: Initial analysis menetapkan setup rebound dengan entry referensi 2.800.
important_history.why_it_matters: Menjadi dasar untuk menilai apakah thesis masih berjalan sesuai rencana.

important_history.summary: Buyer menguat dan kondisi entry dinilai terpenuhi.
User membuka posisi 100 unit di harga 2.800.
important_history.why_it_matters: Entry dan quantity merupakan fakta canonical.

important_history.summary: User mengonfirmasi perubahan stop loss menjadi 2.840.
important_history.why_it_matters: Level 2.840 menjadi batas risiko canonical saat ini.

important_history.summary: Bid support bergeser naik dari 2.850 ke 2.870.
important_history.why_it_matters: Menunjukkan perbaikan kondisi orderbook dibanding update sebelumnya.

user_confirmed_actions.summary: User mengonfirmasi perubahan stop loss menjadi 2.840.

missing_information: Tidak ada chart terbaru pada sesi siang.
warnings: Orderbook bersifat snapshot dan dapat berubah cepat.
items_requiring_review: Periksa kemampuan buyer menyerap offer 2.900 pada update berikutnya.

limitations: Chart terbaru belum tersedia, tetapi konteks chart initial analysis masih dapat digunakan.

examples.summary: BBRI berada dalam status Open Position dengan entry 2.800, stop loss aktif 2.840, dan target 2.920. Thesis rebound masih valid. Harga terakhir 2.890 berada di atas average, buyer moderat, dan bid support naik ke 2.870. Hambatan utama adalah offer 2.900. Rencana terakhir adalah hold selama harga bertahan di atas 2.840 dan pantau kemampuan buyer menyerap resistance 2.900.
